allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('bin:', list\(d.get\('bin',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {Pool}=require\('pg'\); const p=new Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); p.query\(\\"SELECT unnest\(enum_range\(NULL::mode_paiement\)\)::text AS val\\"\).then\(r=>{console.log\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.val\)\);p.end\(\)}\)")
